title: Day 11 Reflection
description: Solidify infinite scroll and event loop knowledge before Day 12 Context API.

prompts.question: Explain the event loop order: synchronous code, microtasks, then macrotasks. Give one example of each.
How does your Intersection Observer trigger the next page load? What happens in cleanup?
prompts.guidance: Describe sentinel ref, callback, and disconnect.

prompts.question: Did you hit duplicate fetch or duplicate item bugs? What guard prevented them?
prompts.guidance: Mention isLoading, hasMore, or deduplication by id.

prompts.question: How is infinite scroll pagination different from Day 09 button pagination?
prompts.guidance: UX, state append vs replace, observer vs click.

prompts.question: What would break if you forgot observer.disconnect() on unmount?
prompts.guidance: Memory leaks, stale callbacks, setState on unmounted component.
